descriptions: The Frappaolo family split from the Pecoraro-Renna clan.
edges.evidence_quote: All'interno del clan si sarebbero verificate delle scissioni, a séguito delle quali sarebbero sorti due gruppi autonomi facenti capo alle famiglie Trimarco, Frappaolo e Giffoni.

descriptions: Los Zetas and Los Zetas Group Bravo are allies per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tijuana Cartel , Juárez Cartel , 'Ndrangheta , Los Mazatlecos , Barrio Azteca , MS-13 , Texas Syndicate , Triad , The Office of Envigado , La Línea , Hezbollah , Sicilian Mafia , Los Zetas Group Bravo

descriptions: The Esposito and Ascione clans fought a war in 1990.
edges.evidence_quote: prima faida di Ercolano : guerra tra gli Esposito e gli Ascione, combattuta quasi interamente nel 1990

'Ndrina Abbruzzese.description: The 'Ndrina Abbruzzese is a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cassano allo Ionio and Corigliano Calabro, in the province of Cosenza, Italy. It emerged in the late 1990s, initially involved in armored car robberies, and is composed of Romani individuals. The group has been involved in a war with other 'ndrine in Cosenza from 1999 to 2001 and has been targeted in several police operations, including Timpone Rosso (2009) and Gentleman (2015).

descriptions: The 'Ndrangheta integrated the Abbruzzese clan into its criminal system, baptizing members and assigning ranks.
edges.evidence_quote: Il pentito Franco Bevilacqua fu il primo a raccontare di come li aveva integrati nel sistema criminale della 'ndrangheta calabrese battezzando alcuni come picciotti e assegnando le doti di camorrista e sgarrista.

descriptions: The Abbruzzese clan tried to involve the families of Cirò in their conflict with Cosenza.
edges.evidence_quote: Di conseguenza il clan degli zingari tentò di coinvolgere le famiglie di Cirò e Corigliano Calabro e far ricadere la colpa su Cosenza.

descriptions: The Abbruzzese clan tried to involve the families of Corigliano Calabro in their conflict with Cosenza.
edges.evidence_quote: Di conseguenza il clan degli zingari tentò di coinvolgere le famiglie di Cirò e Corigliano Calabro e far ricadere la colpa su Cosenza.

descriptions: The Abbruzzese and Forastefano were targeted together in operation Kossa, indicating a cooperative or structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: 16 febbraio 2021: operazione Kossa contro i Forastefano e gli Abbruzzese.

descriptions: Nicola Acri, boss of the 'Ndrina Acri, is linked to the Abbruzzese clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Nicola Acri (1979, detto occhi di ghiaccio) è un criminale italiano di Rossano (CS) legato agli Abbruzzese di Cassano allo Ionio

descriptions: Forastefano and Abbruzzese were originally a single 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: In origine era un'unica 'ndrina insieme agli Abbruzzese

descriptions: Sons of Samoa and P.V.C. are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: P.V.C. (Park Village Crip)

descriptions: Cash Money Brothers was founded by a former Indian Posse member who left due to factionalism.
edges.evidence_quote: Clarence 'Shrimpy' Williams to leave the gang to found a new gang called the Cash Money Brothers

descriptions: Independent Soldiers replaced the Crew as Hells Angels puppet gang in Prince George.
edges.evidence_quote: the Hells Angels had the Independent Soldiers establish a chapter in Prince George as the replacement puppet gang for 'the Crew'.

descriptions: Renegades founded the Crew as a puppet gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels founded a puppet gang in Prince George known as the Renegades who in turn founded another puppet gang known as the Crew.

Newton Gang.description: The Newton Gang was an outlaw group active from around 1919 to 1924, primarily engaged in train and bank robberies across the United States and Canada. Comprising four Newton brothers and an associate, they claimed to have robbed 75 banks and six trains without killing anyone. Their most famous heist was the 1924 Rondout train robbery in Illinois, netting $3 million. The gang's later years saw involvement with the Barrow Gang and continued criminal activity into the 1970s.

descriptions: Newton Gang members provided shelter to the Barrow Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: After the April 6, 1934, murder of Constable Cal Campbell by Clyde Barrow and Henry Methvin in Commerce, Oklahoma, Joe and Willis Newton allowed the Barrow Gang to hide out in a house they owned in Tulsa.

Aprea-Cuccaro clan.description: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan is a Camorra clan operating in the Barra area of Naples, Italy. Founded in the early 1990s by Giovanni Aprea and Angelo Cuccaro, it engages in murder, extortion, drug trafficking, racketeering, and money laundering. The clan has been involved in feuds with rival clans and has political connections. It remains active as of the present.

descriptions: The Andolfi faction is linked to the Cuccaros, part of the Aprea-Cuccaro clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Imperatrice is allegedly the regent of the Andolfi faction, particularly linked to the Cuccaros.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan fought a violent feud with the Celeste-Guarino clan in 2005-2006.
edges.evidence_quote: Aprea-Cuccaro clan and Celeste-Guarino clan : A violent feud fought in the area of Barra, between the Aprea-Cuccaro clan and what according to investigators, was the splitting faction of the Celeste-Guarino in the years 2005 and 2006.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan supported the De Luca Bossa clan against the Sarnos.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan, in fact, is the first to offer support to the De Luca Bossa clan against the Sarnos, in the times of the violent feud between the two organizations.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan is allied with the De Luca Bossa clan.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the latest DIA reports, the Aprea-Cuccaro clan is allied with the Rinaldi clan from San Giovanni a Teduccio , and with the De Luca Bossa clan from Ponticelli , with the intention of undermining the Mazzarella clan.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan formed a criminal alliance with the De Luca Bossa clan and the Rinaldi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the new criminal alliance formed with the De Luca Bossa clan and the Rinaldi clan

descriptions: The Lago clan is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mazzarella clan , Sarno clan (defunct) , Lago clan (defunct) , Formicola clan

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan opposed the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The goal was to resist the pressure exerted by the Mazzarella clan and the Sarno clan.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan and its allies intend to undermine the Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the latest DIA reports, the Aprea-Cuccaro clan is allied with the Rinaldi clan from San Giovanni a Teduccio , and with the De Luca Bossa clan from Ponticelli , with the intention of undermining the Mazzarella clan.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan opposed the Sarno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The goal was to resist the pressure exerted by the Mazzarella clan and the Sarno clan.

descriptions: Giovanni Aprea worked for the Sarno clan early in his career.
edges.evidence_quote: Giovanni Aprea, known as ' e curtiello , a leading figure of the clan, began the criminal career working for Ciro Sarno , then a powerful boss of the Sarno clan from Ponticelli.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan supports the D'Atri faction.
edges.evidence_quote: And through contacts with the local criminals, would have taken control of illicit affairs in the area, supporting the D'Atri faction, a small criminal group already inserted in the underworld of Somma Vesuviana.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan was in a bloody feud with the Formicola clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Aprea-Cuccaro clan and Formicola clan : According to investigators, one of the bloodiest feuds in the eastern area of the city of Naples.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan is allied with the Rinaldi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the latest DIA reports, the Aprea-Cuccaro clan is allied with the Rinaldi clan from San Giovanni a Teduccio , and with the De Luca Bossa clan from Ponticelli , with the intention of undermining the Mazzarella clan.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan formed a criminal alliance with the De Luca Bossa clan and the Rinaldi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the new criminal alliance formed with the De Luca Bossa clan and the Rinaldi clan

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan made an agreement with the Secondigliano Alliance since the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: According to investigators, since the 1990s, the Aprea-Cuccaro clan has entered into an agreement with the Secondigliano Alliance.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa were protected by ties with Aprea-Cuccaro.
edges.evidence_quote: protetti dai legami con gli Aprea-Cuccaro

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Marfella clan, Rinaldi clan, Secondigliano Alliance, Aprea-Cuccaro clan

descriptions: Infobox lists Aprea-Cuccaro clan as a rival of Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Secondigliano Alliance Contini clan, Licciardi clan, Mallardo clan, Rinaldi clan, De Luca Bossa clan, Vollaro clan, Aprea-Cuccaro clan

descriptions: The Rinaldi clan formed an alliance with the Aprea-Cuccaro clan in 2019.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 2019 the clan has formed an alliance with the Ponticelli 's De Luca Bossa clan , and Barra 's Aprea-Cuccaro clan , called by the media Rinaldi-De Luca Bossa-Aprea

descriptions: Aprea-Cuccaro clan is a founding clan and ally of the Secondigliano Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Founding clans : Contini clan , Licciardi clan , Mallardo clan , Di Lauro clan , Rinaldi clan , De Luca Bossa clan , Aprea-Cuccaro clan , Commisso 'ndrina

descriptions: Krazy Getdown Boys are rivals of Latin Counts per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sureños, 12st Players, Almighty Bishops, 4GMz, SVLz, Latin Kings, Two Six, 22Boys, Almighty Ambrose, La Raza, Satan Disciples, Krazy Getdown Boys, Imperial Gangsters, Maniac Latin Disciples, Spanish Gangster Disciples, Insane Deuces, Folk Nation

Clan Gionta.description: The Clan Gionta is a Camorra criminal organization based in Torre Annunziata, Italy. It emerged in the early 1980s under boss Valentino Gionta, engaging in cigarette smuggling, heroin trafficking, and control of the fish market. The clan was known for its violent conflicts with other Camorra groups and was heavily targeted by law enforcement, leading to the arrest of Valentino Gionta in 1985. Despite setbacks, the clan remains active with leadership passing to various members.

descriptions: Infobox lists Gionta clan as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Gionta clan

descriptions: Clan Alfieri attacked and killed members of Clan Gionta.
edges.evidence_quote: uccise 8 persone appartenenti al clan Gionta

descriptions: Clan Alfieri carried out a massacre against the Gionta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: strage di Sant'Alessandro : un commando ... uccide 8 persone appartenenti al clan Gionta

descriptions: Alfieri faction carried out the Torre Annunziata massacre targeting Gionta, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: La strage di Torre Annunziata ... fallisce nell'obiettivo di uccidere Valentino Gionta. La strage venne cagionata da omicidi realizzati dai Nuvoletta-Gionta.

descriptions: The Gallo-Cavalieri and Gionta clans have been in a faida since 1990, with periods of truce and resurgence.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Gallo-Cavalieri e i Gionta : combattuta tra il clan Gionta e il clan Gallo-Cavalieri di Torre Annunziata

descriptions: The Gallo-Cavalieri clan opposed the Gionta clan, leading to a bloody feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Si è per lungo tempo opposto al clan Gionta , generando una sanguinosa faida che ha portato a diversi ammazzati.

descriptions: The feud between the Gallo-Cavalieri and Gionta clans reopened in 2006.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'estate del 2006 l'omicidio di Natale Scarpa ... riapre la faida tra i due clan

descriptions: A peace agreement was made between the Gallo and Gionta clans.
edges.evidence_quote: La guerra ebbe termine grazie all'intervento di Salvatore Riina , il quale venne direttamente da Palermo facendo stipulare un accordo di pace tra Gionta-Gallo.

descriptions: Clan Alfieri carried out a massacre against Clan Gionta.
edges.evidence_quote: la strage di Sant'Alessandro che sarà perpetrata dagli uomini di Carmine Alfieri

descriptions: Clan Gionta strengthened ties with the Chierchia clan through marriage.
edges.evidence_quote: il matrimonio del nipote omonimo del boss Valentino con una ragazza della famiglia di "François" Chierchia

descriptions: Clan Gionta entered into conflict with Antonio Bardellino's clan.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan entra in conflitto con Antonio Bardellino

descriptions: Clan Gionta clashed with the Gallo clan in 2007.
edges.evidence_quote: sei omicidi rivelano lo scontro dei Gionta con il clan Gallo

descriptions: The Gionta clan allied with the Nuvoletta clan during the internal war.
edges.evidence_quote: the Gionta clan allied with Nuvoletta

descriptions: Clan Gionta established contacts with the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: stringe contatti con ... i Nuvoletta di Marano

descriptions: Clan Gionta killed NCO leaders in Torre Annunziata.
edges.evidence_quote: fanno piazza pulita dei capizona della Nuova Camorra Organizzata di Cutolo a Torre Annunziata

descriptions: The Nuvoletta-Gionta alliance fought against the rest of the Nuova Famiglia from 1983 to 1985.
edges.evidence_quote: faida all'interno della Nuova Famiglia : combattuta tra i Nuvoletta - Gionta e la Nuova Famiglia (Alfieri, Galasso, Fabbrocino, Bardellino e Vastarella) negli anni 1983-85

descriptions: Clan Gionta sided with the Nuova Famiglia against Cutolo's NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: affiancandosi alla Nuova Famiglia nella lotta contro il disegno criminale di Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: Gionta clan allied with Società foggiana in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: In September 2019, the Italian police dismantled an international drug trafficking alliance between the powerful Gionta clan of the Camorra, the Società foggiana , also known as the fifth-mafia, and Moroccan drug traffickers.

descriptions: Clan Gionta was an ally of Clan Nuvoletta.
edges.evidence_quote: città del clan Gionta , alleato dei Nuvoletta

descriptions: Nuvoletta and Gionta were allies, as the massacre was carried out by their side.
edges.evidence_quote: La strage venne cagionata da omicidi realizzati dai Nuvoletta-Gionta.

descriptions: Gionta clan was allied with Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: an attack at Torre Annunziata ... led to the massacre of eight members of the Gionta clan allied with the Nuvolettas

descriptions: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia federation.
edges.evidence_quote: the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed. The NF was a federation of Camorra clans which apart from the Nuovoletta clan, consisted of ... the Gionta clan

descriptions: The Gionta clan was the closest ally of the Nuvolettas.
edges.evidence_quote: the gunmen opened fire on individuals linked to Valentino Gionta, the closest ally of the Nuvolettas

descriptions: Nuvoletta and Gionta were allied in a coalition against Casalesi and Alfieri.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'ambito della faida tra le coalizioni Casalesi - Alfieri e Nuvoletta - Gionta

descriptions: The Sauriello-Scarpa clan declared itself in open contrast with the Gionta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: dichiarandosi in aperto contrasto con gli storici clan locali, compreso quello dei Gionta

descriptions: The Vangone-Limelli split from the Gionta clan violently.
edges.evidence_quote: Per via di alcuni screzi e per diversità di vedute nella gestione e nel controllo delle attività illecite sul territorio i boschesi si staccarono dai Gionta. La scissione fu chiaramente sanguinosa

descriptions: The Vangone-Limelli were historically affiliated with the Gionta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il finire degli anni ’70 e l’inizio degli anni ‘80 il capostipite Luigi Limelli, i suoi affiliati e parenti della famiglia Vangone erano storici affiliati del clan Gionta di Torre Annunziata.

descriptions: Corleonesi allied with Nuvoletta, Lubrano-Ligato, and Gionta.
edges.evidence_quote: Elementi di spicco dei Corleonesi ... si allearono con i clan camorristici dei Nuvoletta , Lubrano-Ligato e Gionta

descriptions: Gionta faction fought against Bardellino-Alfieri within Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo la fine della NCO, scoppiò una guerra all'interno della Nuova Famiglia , tra i Nuvoletta-Gionta contro i Bardellino-Alfieri.

descriptions: Gionta clan was a member of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: The NF consisted of Bardellino, Michele Zaza ... the Gionta clan

descriptions: Gionta clan was part of the anti-Cutolo alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Altre famiglie coinvolte nell'ampia alleanza anticutoliana furono ... i Gionta

descriptions: The Gionta clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Valentino Gionta, boss the Gionta clan

descriptions: Società foggiana was part of a drug trafficking alliance with Gionta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: In September 2019, the Italian police dismantled an international drug trafficking alliance between the powerful Gionta clan of the Camorra, the Società Foggiana, and Moroccan drug traffickers.

descriptions: Società Foggiana allied with Gionta clan in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: dismantled an international drug trafficking alliance between the powerful Gionta clan of the Camorra, the Società Foggiana, and Moroccan drug traffickers

descriptions: CJNG allied with local groups to form Cartel Chiapas-Guatemala.
edges.evidence_quote: Esto llevó a que estos grupos locales se aliaran con el CJNG para formar el Cartel Chiapas-Guatemala

descriptions: Cartel Chiapas-Guatemala was formed to oppose Los Huistas' dominance.
edges.evidence_quote: En 2024-2025, surgieron tensiones cuando Los Huistas comenzaron a cobrar 'impuestos' por el paso de drogas a otros grupos locales, como la banda de 'Tío Balde'. Esto llevó a que estos grupos locales se aliaran con el CJNG para formar el Cartel Chiapas-Guatemala, buscando hacer frente a la hegemonía de Los Huistas.

descriptions: Tío Balde joined with CJNG to form Cartel Chiapas-Guatemala.
edges.evidence_quote: Esto llevó a que estos grupos locales se aliaran con el CJNG para formar el Cartel Chiapas-Guatemala

edges.target: Lebanese Brigades to Fight the Israeli Occupation
descriptions: Hezbollah created this group.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1997, Hezbollah formed the multi-confessional Lebanese Brigades to Fight the Israeli Occupation

descriptions: Sergi used a gas station managed by the Moscardi family as an office.
edges.evidence_quote: il distributore Esso in via Milano a Corsico, gestito dalla famiglia Moscardi

descriptions: Black Jackets and Bandogs are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Rock Machine , Veles gang , Black Dogs , Bandogs , 210 International , Dogpack 416 , Black Army , Holmblaaa , Kommando 210

Wo Hop To.description: Wo Hop To is a triad group based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong, founded in 1908 in Sai Ying Pun as a secret political organization opposing the Qing dynasty. It specializes in protection rackets and is affiliated with the Sun Yee On triad. During the early 1990s, it expanded into the United States, particularly San Francisco, where it controlled Chinatown illegal activities. It is one of the Four Major Gangs of Hong Kong.

descriptions: Jackson Street Boys succeeded Wo Hop To after law enforcement cracked down on Wo Hop To around 1992.
edges.evidence_quote: The Jackson Boys gang was the successor to the Wo Hop To Triad which ruled the streets of San Francisco's Chinatown in the 1980s and early 1990s.

descriptions: Infobox lists Wo Hop To as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: TRG formed alliances with Wo Hop To.
edges.evidence_quote: They have formed alliances with Chinese organizations such as the 14K , Wah Ching and Wo Hop To in California and the New York City -based Ghost Shadows .

descriptions: Wo Hop To killed Wah Ching's leader, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1991, Danny "Ah Pai" Wong, the leader of Wah Ching, was shot and killed by Wo Hop To (WHT) hitmen from Seattle Chinatown.

descriptions: Infobox lists Wo Hop To as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Asian Boyz, Bamboo Union, Black Dragons, Chung Ching Yee, Wo Hop To

descriptions: The Hop Sing and Wo Hop To merged under an alliance led by Peter Chong and Raymond Chow.
edges.evidence_quote: Under the alliance, the Hop Sing and Wo Hop To merged, and an umbrella organization, Tien Hu Wui, was formed to oversee their combined business.

descriptions: Jackson Street Boys were founded by former Wah Ching members who had defected to Wo Hop To.
edges.evidence_quote: After law enforcement cracked down on the Wo Hop To around 1992, former Wah Ching members who had defected to the Wo Hop To founded the Jackson Street Boys

descriptions: Wo Hop To is affiliated with Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Wo Hop To specialises in protection rackets and is affiliated with the Sun Yee On triad.

descriptions: Wo Hop To sought to create Tien Ha Wui as an umbrella organization to unify crime operations.
edges.evidence_quote: This was a first step in an effort to form an umbrella organization called Tien Ha Wui ("Whole Earth Association") that would dominate crime in Chinatowns throughout the U.S.

descriptions: Infobox lists Tiny Rascal Gang as an ally of Wo Hop To.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sun Yee On Tiny Rascal Gang

descriptions: Wo Hop To forced Wah Ching out of San Francisco, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Jackson Street Boys was founded by three brothers, Bobby Tsan, Johnny Tsan and Tommy Tsan, who were former Wah Ching members who had defected to the Wo Hop To after the Wo Hop To forced the Wah Ching out of San Francisco.

descriptions: The two groups were in a violent power struggle in San Francisco.
edges.evidence_quote: At about the same time, the Wah Ching and Wo Hop To were struggling for power in San Francisco.

descriptions: Wo Hop To chased Wah Ching out of the Bay Area, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Wo Hop To chased the Wah Ching gang out of the Bay Area and the Wah Ching headed to Southern California.

descriptions: Infobox lists Wah Ching as a rival of Wo Hop To.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Wah Ching

descriptions: Wo Shing Wo in Toronto was established as a branch of Wo Hop To.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wo Shing Wo was established in Toronto in 1930 as an international branch of the Wo Hop To

descriptions: Hells Angels absorbed the Aliens gang by patching them over into a chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels founded their first chapters in New York state on December 5, 1969 by 'patching over' the Aliens motorcycle gang of New York City

descriptions: Hells Angels absorbed the Aliens gang by patching them over.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels founded their first chapters in New York state on December 5, 1969 by "patching over" the Aliens motorcycle gang of New York City

descriptions: Varacalli and Polifroni were allied against Barillaro-Romano-Zucco in the Ciminà feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Ciminà : a partire dal 4 giugno 1966 ... vengono coinvolte le famiglie Barillaro-Romano-Zucco da una parte, e i Varacalli-Franco-Polifroni-Spagnolo dall'altra.

descriptions: S.C.F is a rival of AFCA.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: S.C.F

descriptions: Barrera Cartel is listed as an ally of Los Rastrojos in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Barrera cartel, The Office of Envigado

'Ndrina Mangeruca.description: The Mangeruca are a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta, a Calabrian mafia-type criminal organization. They operate in Cornaredo, near Milan, Italy, but originate from Cirò Marina, Calabria. Active since the 1970s, they are involved in construction, furniture businesses, and public establishments such as bars and restaurants. Recent legal actions include arrests and charges for extortion and aggravated robbery.

descriptions: 'Ndrina Mangeruca is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mangeruca sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta

descriptions: ACC fought a bloody war with Bloque Centauros for control of Casanare.
edges.evidence_quote: Entre 2003 y 2004 se desató de manera muy cruenta el conflicto entre las ACC con el Bloque Centauros de Arroyave por el control del departamento de Casanare.

descriptions: Bloque Centauros clashed with ACC.
edges.evidence_quote: the Centauros soon began clashing with a rival paramilitary group, the Peasant Self-Defense Forces of Casanare (ACC).

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
descriptions: ERPAC is the successor of Bloque Centauros, inheriting its territory and drug trafficking operations.
edges.evidence_quote: É o herdeiro dos espaços tanto dos militares como do narcotráfico do Bloque Centauros das Autodefesas Unidas da Colômbia

European Kindred.description: The European Kindred (EK) is a white supremacist prison and street gang founded in 1998 in the Oregon prison system by David Patrick Kennedy. It operates primarily in Oregon, with an estimated 500 members. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, assaults, and dog fighting, and is known for its violent initiation and exit rituals.

descriptions: The Iovine faction is a faction within the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Mentre per la fazione Iovine, secondo la DDA risulta essere quasi totalmente assente dopo il pentimento del boss Antonio Iovine

descriptions: Iovine is a faction of the Clan dei Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: esponente del clan della fazione Iovine

descriptions: Maresca clan was part of the anti-Cutolo alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Altre famiglie coinvolte nell'ampia alleanza anticutoliana furono ... i Maresca di Castellammare di Stabia
